Innate Abilities, Weirdness & Mutations

Your life essence is reduced to manifest your ancestor. (-10% HP)
You cannot be hasted, slowed, berserked, paralysed or teleported.
You can dig through walls and to a lower floor.
You have a pair of large antennae on your head. (SInv)
Your four strong arms can wield two-handed weapons with a shield.

Message History

The flame cauterises the wound! You slice the four-headed hydra!!
You burn the four-headed hydra.
You slice one of the two-headed hydra's heads off!
The flame cauterises the wound! You slash the one-headed hydra!
You burn the one-headed hydra.
You kill the one-headed hydra!
You slash the thorn hunter! You burn the thorn hunter terribly.
You hit the briar patch. You burn the briar patch terribly.
The grasping roots constrict the four-headed hydra!
The grasping roots constrict the spriggan berserker!
The grasping roots constrict the thorn hunter.
The roots around the four-headed hydra sink back into the ground.
The thorn hunter hits you but does no damage. x2
You block the spriggan berserker's attack.
The four-headed hydra bites you but does no damage. x4
The swamp dragon is struck by the briar patch's thorns.
The swamp dragon bites the briar patch!
The briar patch is destroyed!
The thorn hunter hits you.
* * * LOW HITPOINT WARNING * * *
The thorn hunter hits you but does no damage.
You block the spriggan berserker's attack.
You slash the spriggan berserker! You burn the spriggan berserker.
The spriggan berserker is almost dead.
You hit the thorn hunter. You burn the thorn hunter terribly.
You slash the briar patch! You burn the briar patch terribly.
You destroy the briar patch!
You hit the briar patch. You burn the briar patch terribly.
You slice one of the four-headed hydra's heads off!
The flame cauterises the wound! You slice the three-headed hydra!!
You burn the three-headed hydra.
You kill the three-headed hydra!
The grasping roots constrict the spriggan berserker!
The grasping roots constrict the thorn hunter!
The briar patch crumbles away.
The roots around the thorn hunter sink back into the ground.
The roots around the spriggan berserker sink back into the ground.
The spriggan berserker hits you with a +0 hand axe!!
You die...
Hepliaklqana delivers you to your ancestors.
